original_image_tags: Two black circular holes punched through the top of the document, likely from a two-hole punch for filing.

elements.description: Page contains multiple blue and red ink reception stamps. A blue stamp on the left reads 'RECEIVED MAY 1 3:56 PM '64 PHYSICS & CHEMISTRY FBI LABORATORY'. Another blue stamp below it reads 'RECEIVED-CONRAD MAY 1 2:20 PM '64 FBI LABORATORY DIV/SWAT H'. A blue stamp at the bottom center reads 'RECEIVED FBI-LABORATORY MAY 1 3:32 PM '64'. A blue stamp at the bottom right reads 'REC'D DOM INTELL DIV APR 30 4:25 PM'. A red stamp at the bottom left reads 'MAY 4 1964'. The background is a light blue-gray paper with four hole-punch marks at the top.

judge.reason: Description A describes only hole-punch marks while Description B describes specific reception stamps with quoted text, indicating they are describing fundamentally different visual content on the page.
